About ANTHRŌPOS

Built by operators. Powered by Alpha Intelligence. Designed for businesses ready to stop losing revenue to missed calls, dead leads, and outdated systems.

Who We Are →

Our Services

📞

ARIA — AI Voice Receptionist

Your business answers every call — day or night, weekday or weekend. Books appointments, qualifies leads, and texts callers back instantly. Customers think they're talking to your team. You stop losing business to voicemail.

10 people call at once during your lunch rush — every single one gets answered. No hold music. No missed leads. No apology calls the next morning.

Starting at $297/mo

Hear ARIA in Action →
🛡️

GUARDIAN — Reputation Management

Every customer gets routed through a private rating page before they can post publicly. 4–5 stars go straight to Google. 1–3 stars come to you privately so you can fix it first. Your competitors are getting negative reviews you'll never see. Your clients won't.

$297/mo

See GUARDIAN in Action →
📍

Google Optimization

Google rewards active businesses. We manage your entire Google presence — weekly posts, review responses, profile accuracy, and monthly performance reporting. Businesses that go dark get buried. Yours won't.

Starting at $299/mo

See What We Do →
🌐

AI-Powered Website

Professional site with AI chatbot that captures leads and books appointments while you sleep.

Starting at $799

Talk to The Oracle →
⚡

Business Automation

Automated follow-up, reminders, reactivation campaigns, pipeline management. Nobody falls through the cracks — ever.

See the Transformation →
